CREATE TABLE tmp (str String) ENGINE = Log;
CREATE TABLE tmp2 (id UInt32, value String) ENGINE = Log;
SELECT count(DISTINCT t) FROM (SELECT queryID() AS t FROM remote('127.0.0.{1..3}', currentDatabase(), 'tmp') GROUP BY queryID());
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT t) FROM (SELECT queryID() AS t FROM remote('127.0.0.{1..3}', currentDatabase(), 'tmp') WHERE str LIKE 'a%' GROUP BY queryID());
SELECT queryID() AS current_query_id, COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT queryID() FROM remote('127.0.0.{1..3}', currentDatabase(), 'tmp2') GROUP BY queryID()) AS queries;
SELECT tmp.str, queryID() AS query_id FROM tmp JOIN tmp2 ON tmp.str LIKE concat('%', tmp2.value, '%') GROUP BY tmp.str;
WITH (SELECT queryID() AS id FROM tmp) AS query_ids SELECT id FROM query_ids WHERE id IS NOT NULL;
SELECT queryID() AS qid, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tmp2) AS total FROM remote('127.0.0.{1..3}', currentDatabase(), 'tmp') GROUP BY qid;
WITH (SELECT queryID() AS id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT value FROM tmp2)) AS ids SELECT * FROM ids WHERE id LIKE '%a%';
SELECT DISTINCT queryID() FROM remote('127.0.0.{1..3}', currentDatabase(), 'tmp') UNION SELECT DISTINCT queryID() FROM remote('127.0.0.{1..3}', currentDatabase(), 'tmp2');
CREATE TABLE complex_tmp AS SELECT tmp.str AS str, queryID() AS query_id FROM tmp GROUP BY str, query_id;
SELECT query_id, COUNT(*) FROM complex_tmp GROUP BY query_id HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
SELECT queryID() as id, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT id) FROM tmp2) as total_id_count FROM tmp GROUP BY id;
